title: Dangerous function used (shell execution or obfuscation)
description: Functions like passthru(), proc_open(), dl(), and str_rot13() enable shell execution or code obfuscation and should not appear in production modules.
explanation: passthru/proc_open/popen/pcntl_exec execute OS commands. dl() loads PHP extensions at runtime. str_rot13() is commonly used to obfuscate malicious code. None belong in production modules.
fix: Remove the dangerous function call. If external process interaction is genuinely needed, document the requirement and use escapeshellarg() on all inputs.

examples.good: // Use a PHP library instead of shell commands
